title: Ceeniu Smart Car Air Freshener, Waterless Ultrasonic, Auto ON/OFF, Plug-Free, Mint Ice Scent, French Natural Fragrance, 4-Month Supply, F26 Car Aroma Diffuser
features: 🏆【Redefining Freshness】Enjoy the finest, smoke-like spray with Ceeniu’s F26 car aroma diffuser. Its advanced waterless ultrasonic technology maximizes the benefits of natural fragrances and ensures exceptional durability.

✅【Smart Auto On/Off】Enjoy seamless convenience with smart induction-vibration technology. The F26 automatically turns on when you start your car and off when you stop, saving energy and effort. A great value car air fresheners for men and women.

✅【Long-Lasting Battery】The F26 car air fresheners boasts a built-in battery that lasts up to 60 hours on a single one-hour charge, perfect for long trips and daily use. Experience unmatched reliability and convenience.

✅【Adjustable Scent Modes】Customise your car’s fragrance with three settings: Strong, Light, and Smart Mode. Whether bold, moderate, or subtle, Ceeniu air freshener car delivers a lasting aroma to suit your preference.

✅【Pure Natural Fragrance】Using only pure, natural French fragrances, the F26 is safe for everyone, including pregnant women and children. Each 45ml refill lasts 2-6 months, providing exceptional value.
❤️ 【Ceeniu Care】Designed for your needs, the F26 car aroma diffuser comes with a 1-year "CeeniuCare" warranty for total peace of mind and exceptional support.
